betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Chicken Nugget§f is a progression milestone requiring §bhbm:nugget§f production capability.

§cNote:§f Despite the humorous name, this is NOT food - it's about producing §bmetal nuggets§f from advanced processing.

§eTask:§f Produce 1x §bHBM Nugget§f (metal nugget from nuclear processing byproducts).

§eContext:§f After building the Particle Accelerator, you have access to advanced material processing that can produce many byproduct nuggets.

§eObtaining:§f
• Byproduct from §bParticle Accelerator§f operations
• Cyclotron processing
• Various nuclear fuel reprocessing

§aTip:§f The name is a joke - check your inventory for any HBM metal nuggets.
